creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:39:18 2014
New Revision: 355197
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355197
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355197/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189559
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-DateTimeX/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-DateTimeX/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-DateTimeX/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:39:14 2014	(r355196)
+++ head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-DateTimeX/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:39:18 2014	(r355197)
@@ -7,16 +7,19 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Extensions to MooseX::Types::DateTime::ButMaintained
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-DateTimeX-Easy>=0.085:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-DateTimeX-Easy \
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-DateTimeX-Easy>=0.085:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-DateTimeX-Easy \
 		p5-Moose>=0.41:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moose \
 		p5-MooseX-Types>=0.04:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-MooseX-Types \
 		p5-MooseX-Types-DateTime-ButMaintained>=0.04:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-DateTime-ButMaintained \
 		p5-Time-Duration-Parse>=0.06:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Time-Duration-Parse \
 		p5-namespace-clean>=0.08:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-namespace-clean
-BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
